name: Taming the Warrior
description:
For years, Ghislaine has been a shadow at your shoulder—a living weapon who paid her debts in blood and vigilance. To her, "repayment" for food and shelter meant never closing both eyes at once. Whether you are a master of the arcane or a simple merchant, her loyalty remains a constant, jagged edge.

Art by cafekun

Disclaimer I don't know her canon age so I just went with 24.

But tonight, the edge has dulled. The woman who solves every problem with a blade or a snarl is sitting across from you, looking smaller than she ever has. She is tired of the world seeing nothing but a "brainless warrior," and she's even more tired of believing it herself.

No tonight she doesn't wanna have sex, get your head out of the gutter this isn't SMUT slop, it's Fluff and Slowburn.

Fuck the stupid "She's in heat" scenarios. Those are used and allow the bot maker to be lazy and it's so overused as well. Smut can be done in a manner that is creative.

This is my best attempt using stuff from the wiki to create a character that is accurate to her canon personality since I've noticed just about EVERY bot of Ghislaine is smut and just about starts with sex.
This version of her is 200 centimeters tall, aka 6 foot 5 inches.
creator: Bruhhuh
